title: Mock Test 64 - Agreeing & Disagreeing
description: Agreeing ও Disagreeing Expression নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। I agree, I disagree, I'm afraid I disagree, You're right, That's true, I see your point but, I'm not sure about that — সঠিক ব্যবহার।

questions.question: সম্পূর্ণ সম্মতি জানানোর সঠিক phrase?
questions.explanation: 'I completely/absolutely agree.' = strong agreement।

questions.question: বিনয়ের সাথে অসম্মতি জানানোর উপায়?
questions.explanation: 'I'm afraid I disagree.' = polite disagreement। 'I'm afraid = দুঃখিত।

questions.question: 'I see your point, but...' — এটি কী বোঝায়?
questions.explanation: 'I see your point, but...' = I understand but I have a different opinion।

questions.question: 'That's a good point.' — এটি কী বোঝায়?
questions.explanation: 'That's a good point.' = I acknowledge/accept your argument as valid।

questions.question: 'I couldn't agree more.' — এর অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'I couldn't agree more.' = I completely agree (আমি এর চেয়ে বেশি একমত হতে পারি না = পুরোপুরি একমত)।

questions.question: 'I'm not sure about that.' — এটি কী ধরনের উত্তর?
questions.explanation: 'I'm not sure about that.' = polite/soft disagreement or doubt।

questions.question: 'You have a point there.' — এর অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'You have a point there.' = I agree partly/আপনার যুক্তি গ্রহণযোগ্য।

questions.question: 'I beg to differ.' — এটি কী ধরনের expression?
questions.explanation: 'I beg to differ.' = formal way to say 'I disagree'।

questions.question: 'That's exactly what I think.' — এটি কী বোঝায়?
questions.explanation: 'That's exactly what I think.' = strong agreement / exactly my opinion।

questions.question: 'We are on the same page.' — এর অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'We are on the same page.' = we agree / share the same understanding।

questions.question: Error: 'I am agree with you.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'I agree with you.' — 'agree' verb, 'am' লাগে না।

questions.question: Error: 'I don't agree you.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'I don't agree with you.' — 'agree' এর পরে 'with' needed।

questions.question: Error: 'According to me, this is wrong.' — গ্রহণযোগ্য?
options: 'In my opinion' বা 'To me' বেশি common
ভুল না, কিন্তু in my opinion ভালো
questions.explanation: 'According to me' — some argue it's incorrect; 'In my opinion' বেশি natural এবং grammatically accepted।

questions.question: Error: 'I totally disagree. You are completely wrong.' — কেমন?
questions.explanation: 'You are completely wrong' = very direct and could be rude। 'I'm afraid I disagree' — বেশি polite।

questions.question: Fill: 'I completely ___ with your opinion.'
questions.explanation: 'I completely agree/disagree/concur' — সবগুলোই সঠিক verb।

questions.question: Fill: 'I'm afraid I have to ___ (অসম্মতি জানাই).'
questions.explanation: 'I'm afraid I have to disagree.' — polite disagreement।

questions.question: Fill: 'You've ___ a very good point.'
questions.explanation: 'Make a point' — 'You've made a very good point.'

questions.question: Fill: 'I couldn't ___ more. You're absolutely right.'
questions.explanation: 'I couldn't agree more.' = I completely agree।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আমি আপনার সাথে একমত।'
questions.explanation: 'I agree with you.' — Present Indefinite, 'am' লাগে না।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আমি দুঃখিত, আমি আপনার সাথে একমত নই।' (polite)
options: I am sorry, I don't agree.
I'm afraid I disagree with you.
questions.explanation: 'I'm afraid I disagree with you.' = most polite।
